# REQ-CR-260003: Desktop-Only MVP and Minimal Placeholder Policy

- Class: CR
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-04-17
- Source decision: C5, C7 (Responsiveness target, placeholder page policy)

## Requirement

MVP delivery shall optimize the workspace for desktop interaction only, and any non-core pages shall be minimal placeholders with baseline branding/navigation and reliable return access to the main workspace.

## Rationale

Constraining responsiveness and placeholder scope protects MVP focus on core graph workflows while preserving a coherent product shell.

## Scope Notes

- In scope for MVP: desktop-oriented interaction design and minimal placeholder pages.
- Out of scope for this requirement: tablet/mobile parity and full non-core page implementations.

## Verification

- UX checks confirm primary workspace interactions are designed for desktop keyboard/mouse.
- Route checks confirm non-core placeholder pages are clearly marked and link back to workspace.
- Release checks confirm tablet/mobile support is not a blocker for MVP acceptance.

## Traceability

- Related ADRs: ADR-260014
- Related backlog items: BI-260011
